contacts.modeApprove: Prepares the reply, you confirm before sending
contacts.modeSilent: Does not reply to this contact
contacts.name: Name
contacts.emptyHint: No contacts. They arrive from channels (WhatsApp/Telegram) or add them manually.
contacts.mergeConfirmBody: will disappear; its channels and memory move to
contacts.personaInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. they're a client: professional, formal, no private details
contacts.memoryContactOnly: Only the history with this contact
contacts.noInfoExtracted: No information extracted. Press «Generate from messages».
contacts.responseProfilesDesc: Reusable personas: tone and instructions you assign to contacts (also per channel, e.g. «Marco on Telegram → Work»).
contacts.profileInstructionsPlaceholder: instructions (e.g. be formal, no private details)

automations.lead: A rule: when something happens — at a time or on an event — Homun runs an action with all its tools (skills, connectors, browser, memory).
automations.whenTriggerPlaceholder: e.g. new unread emails from Mario
automations.actionPlaceholder: What Homun should do when it triggers… (it picks skills, connectors, browser and memory automatically)
automations.askConfirmation: Ask confirmation before sending or publishing
automations.emptyHint: No automation. Create one above, or ask me in chat — e.g. «every Friday at 6pm send me the week's summary».
automations.scheduledHint: Queued runs, including reminders created from chat. Cancel one here if you no longer want it.
automations.whenTriggerHint: Describe it in words: I translate it. The technical field to avoid duplicates is set automatically ({{connectorKey}}). For precise setups, ask me in chat.
automations.eventAccessHint: Event rules run only for contacts/channels authorized on the selected project. Missing access is denied by default.

sidebar.projectFolderHintPost: : generated files and artifacts end up there.

learningView.title: What I learned
learningView.lead: Habits, preferences and automations stay readable and correctable before becoming autonomous actions.
learningView.habitsHint: Each insight shows why it exists and how to control it.
learningView.automationsHint: Proposals created from recurring patterns, never activated blindly.

memoryView.consolidateAllTitle: Merges fragments and removes noise from personal memory
memoryView.consolidateProjectTitle: Merges fragments and removes noise for this project
memoryView.exportTitle: Download memories, entities and relations as a JSON file
memoryView.noInfoForFilters: No information for the chosen filters.
memoryView.selectProjectHint: Select a project to see the graph and wiki of how information connects — like a brain.

common.startAndEnableThenReload: Start it and enable the mode, then reload:

research.label: Research & report
research.seed: Research and write me a report on

meeting.label: Meeting minutes
meeting.seed: Write the minutes of this meeting:

chat.approvalRequired: Your confirmation is needed to continue
chat.proposedGoalsHint: Proposed goals — save them in the project
chat.elevateDecisionToGoal: Or elevate a directional decision to a goal
chat.noArtifacts: No artifacts yet. Files generated or created by the assistant appear here.
chat.noBackgroundActivity: No background activity. Scheduled and recurring tasks appear here.
chat.noOperationalPlan: No active operational plan. When the assistant plans a multi-step task, steps appear here.
chat.buildingLocalContext: Building the local context and starting generation.
chat.generationLimitReached: Generation reached the limit. Continuing automatically ({{attempt}}).
chat.completingInSameMessage: Completing the response in the same message.
chat.noPreviousPromptToRegenerate: Can't find the previous prompt to regenerate.
chat.noResponseToContinue: Can't find the response to continue.
chat.noComputerSessionFound: No computer session found in the local core.
chat.changeModelHint: Change the model for this chat from the selector in the composer ↓
chat.responseLikelyInterrupted: Response likely interrupted. You can continue the generation.
chat.noGoalsYet: No goals yet — define one or have it proposed.
chat.noProposals: No proposals — try writing one yourself.
chat.largeProjectPickFolder: Large project: pick a folder to map (so the map stays readable and fast).
chat.mappingProject: Mapping the project… it takes a moment the first time.
chat.noMemoryForProject: No memory for this project yet. Decisions, touched files and facts will appear here as a navigable graph as we work.
chat.noWikiPagesYet: No wiki pages yet. The project's decisions are projected here in markdown as we work.
chat.graphTruncated: Large graph: showing the top {{shown}} nodes connected out of {{total}}. For the rest, ask in chat (queries use the whole graph).
chat.previewUnavailableForType: Preview not available for this type. Use “Download”.
chat.connectionNotCompleted: Connection not completed. Retry, or link it from Settings → Connectors.
chat.reconnectionNotCompleted: Reconnection not completed. Retry, or use Settings → Connectors.
chat.destructiveWarning: ⚠ DESTRUCTIVE action on {{service}}: deletes/removes data. Proceed only if it is exactly what you want.
chat.actsOnIdentifiedItem: The action acts on the already identified item (no fields to edit).
chat.emptyHeroSub: I'm ready. Just write to me: I reply locally.
chat.forcedCapabilityNextMessage: Capability forced for the next message
chat.sandboxReadOnlyDesc: Homun is in read-only mode, so the write to {{target}} was blocked — nothing was written.
chat.sandboxReadOnlyDescNoTarget: Homun is in read-only mode, so the write was blocked — nothing was written.
chat.sandboxReadOnlySwitchedHint: Re-send your message so Homun can make the write. The OS sandbox fence stays active.
chat.whatToChangeInPlan: What to change in the plan?

blocked.recovered: Recovered after restart: local resources released, task re-queued.
blocked.resource: Waiting for local resources to become available.

tasksView.title: Tasks and approvals
tasksView.selectTaskHint: Select a task to see its status.

approval.confirmPlanReason: The plan contains a step that needs confirmation before proceeding. This does not authorize purchases, logins, sends or automatic payments.
approval.click: The browser wants to click on a page element. Confirm only if you want to proceed.
approval.close: The browser wants to close a page or window. Confirm only if it is no longer needed.
approval.type: The browser wants to send text as a submit. Confirm only if the content is correct.
approval.default: The browser requires confirmation before proceeding.

settings.concurrencyDesc: How many inferences the runtime lets run at once. Automatic based on the provider (local 1, cloud 4).
settings.concurrencyLocalWarn: Local provider detected: high concurrency can saturate memory.
settings.systemNotificationsDesc: Alert me via the OS when a message arrives or a scheduled task is ready, even with the app in the background.
settings.systemNotificationsBlocked: Blocked — enable Homun under System Settings → Notifications.
settings.systemNotificationsTest: Notifications are on — you'll be alerted here.
settings.systemNotificationsFailed: The system refused to show the notification ({{reason}}). Check that Homun is allowed to notify you in your OS notification settings.
settings.describeNoProfile: A model describes models without a profile
settings.adaptiveFloorDesc: Scale the agent's in-loop structure to the model's capability: weaker/local models get more guardrails, more capable models get more freedom. The around-the-loop harness (memory, tools, safety) stays the same. Off by default.
settings.adaptiveFloorShadow: Shadow mode (set via env): the decision is computed and logged per turn without changing behaviour, for evaluation.
settings.sandboxModeDesc: Controls where Homun's file tools may write. Workspace-write (default) confines writes to the project folder and tool caches; read-only blocks project writes and offers to escalate per write; danger lifts the app-level write confinement. The OS kernel fence around shell commands stays active in every mode — Homun never fully unsandboxes.
settings.sandboxModeDangerWarn: Relaxes the app-level write confinement and approval prompts only. The OS sandbox fence around shell commands stays active — Homun never fully unsandboxes — but file tools may write outside the project folder. Only use if you trust every action.
settings.approvalPolicyDesc: When Homun pauses to ask before an action that changes things (writes, commands, connectors).
settings.approvalPolicyNeverWarn: Homun will act without asking. The OS sandbox fence still applies; use only with a tight sandbox mode.
settings.sandboxDefaultDesc: These settings apply to every project unless a project overrides them below. The OS kernel fence around shell commands stays active in every mode — Homun never fully unsandboxes.
settings.sandboxProjectsDesc: Give a specific project a tighter or looser policy than the default. Leave an axis on “Inherit default” to keep following the global setting.
settings.sandboxWritableRootsDesc: Extra folders writable beyond the project root (for scripts/builds).
settings.sandboxSkillConfirmDesc: Categories that ALWAYS require confirmation in this project.
settings.sandboxSkillConfirmDescDefault: Categories that ALWAYS require confirmation, in every project.
settings.timezoneHint: The timezone decides how the assistant interprets "today", "tomorrow" and times — and it is also applied to the contained browser, so date-based searches use the right day.
settings.languageHint: The language the assistant replies and speaks in. The interface follows the same choice.
settings.everythingLocalHint: Everything stays on your device: memory, tasks and audit never leave the computer.
settings.deleteLocalDataDesc: Removes memory, tasks and audit from the device. Irreversible.
settings.profileImageReadError: Could not read this image. Try a PNG, JPEG or WebP file.
settings.profileImageDecodeError: This image format is not supported here. Export it as PNG, JPEG or WebP and try again.
settings.themeSurfaceHint: The interface background tones. The accent stays the one chosen below — the two choices combine.
settings.accentHint: The brand accent is teal. You can make it yours — it applies to the whole app right away.
settings.generalHint: Appearance and language follow the app preferences.
settings.addProviderAndRefresh: Add a provider and refresh its models.
settings.imageRoleMissingHint: No image-generation model is available. Decks will be created without generated images until you enable an image-capable provider or refresh its model catalog.
settings.visionRoleMissingHint: No vision-capable model is available. If you attach an image to a chat whose model cannot see, Homun will have to tell you it can't read it — install or enable a vision model to have it read images for any chat.
settings.addProviderDesc: Any OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic or local Ollama endpoint. The key is encrypted in the secret store, never shown.
settings.configureProviderDesc: {{name}} is a built-in provider preset. Add the key and keep the endpoint unless the provider changes it.
settings.noModelsRefreshHint: No model. Press "Refresh" to read the catalog.
settings.strengthsPlaceholder: e.g. Coding & agentic frontier. 1M context. Multimodal.
settings.localFirstDesc: Memory, tasks and audit stay on the device unless you explicitly opt in.
settings.vaultPinHint: The PIN stays local and protects one-shot CVV plus future payment approvals. The Vault never stores the PIN in plaintext.
settings.vaultChangePinDesc: Requires the current PIN. The new PIN must be 6-12 digits.
settings.vaultNewPinDesc: 6-12 digits. The first local PIN is created on this device.
settings.vaultVerifyPinDesc: Local check for debugging the Vault gate.
settings.vaultSaveSensitiveHint: Use this form for data that must not enter chat. The value is sent to the local gateway only with the PIN and is stored encrypted.
settings.vaultCategoryDesc: Used for future Vault policy and search.
settings.vaultLabelDesc: Visible metadata. Do not put the secret value here.
settings.vaultManualPinDesc: Unlocks the master key only for this save.
settings.vaultCurrentPinRequired: Enter the current PIN to change it.
settings.vaultManualRequired: Enter a label and value to save.
settings.vaultManualPinRequired: Enter the local PIN to encrypt this data.
settings.vaultConflictKey: A record with the same key already exists ({{label}}) with a different value. Update it, add a separate record, or keep the existing one.
settings.vaultConflictValue: This value is already stored under a different record ({{label}}). Add it here too, update that record, or keep it as is.
settings.vaultEditRequired: Enter a label to update this data.
settings.vaultEditPin: Local PIN to reveal or update the value
settings.noLinkedAccount: No linked account. Connect a toolkit from the Toolkit tab.
settings.revokeTitle: Revoke: {{name}} will ask for confirmation again
settings.authorizeInBrowser: Authorize {{name}} in the browser, then come back here.
settings.callbackPrefix: In {{name}}'s OAuth app (developer panel) add this
settings.addMcpServerDesc: An MCP server (Model Context Protocol) exposes tools via stdio. Provide the command and arguments to start it.
settings.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect {{name}}? It will be removed from the connected servers.
settings.feedbackHint: Creates an archive with the technical logs (no memory or chat data; logs may contain file paths or message fragments) to attach to your report.
settings.feedbackError: Could not create the archive. Check that ~/.homun/logs is accessible.
settings.updateDownloadHint: On Windows and Linux the update is a manual download: it opens the releases page where you download and run the installer.
settings.updateCheckUnavailable: Update check isn't available in this build.
settings.skillFolderHint: A skill is a folder in Agent Skills format: a SKILL.md with a name and description (what the model reads to decide when to use it). Put them in this folder and they will appear here automatically:
settings.skillsAreCode: They are code: install only what you trust.
settings.realContainedBrowser: Real contained browser · live noVNC view
settings.whereAssistantSaves: Where the assistant can save files
settings.destinationsDesc: Authorized folders where the assistant can copy generated files (e.g. ~/Reports), on request or in automation. It can write ONLY here.
settings.noAuthorizedFolder: No authorized folder. Add one to allow saving.
settings.artifactsDesc: Files created by skills stay on disk{{location}}. Deleted conversations do not delete deliverables; remove files here when you want to clean them up.
settings.botTokenPlaceholder: bot token (123456:ABC…) — empty if already saved
settings.autoReplyDesc: Replies on its own to allowlisted contacts; other actions stay behind confirmation.
settings.channelOffHint: The channel is off: auto-reply does not trigger until you re-enable «Active channel».
settings.allowlistHint: Only these contacts can receive an automatic reply (applies to all channels). WhatsApp: international number without "+" (e.g. 39333…) or full JID (e.g. 1234@lid). Telegram: numeric user id (e.g. 123456789).
settings.untrustedDataHint: Incoming messages are treated as untrusted data: auto-reply (text only) applies only to allowlisted contacts and actions stay behind confirmation.
settings.whatsappPairPrefix: On your phone: WhatsApp ▸ Linked devices ▸ Link a device ▸
settings.whatsappConnectPrefix: If you already linked the device, press
settings.whatsappConnectSuffix: (reuse the saved session). For the first link, enter the number in international format without "+" (e.g. 39333…).
settings.memoryPaneIntro: Here you see and manage what the assistant has learned about you. Personal memory applies to all projects; project memory only in the active one. Sensitive data (e.g. personal data or documents) stay to-be-confirmed and are not used until you approve them.
settings.memoryPaneContacts: Contacts (people, channels, cards) are managed in the Contacts section here in settings.
settings.nothingStoredYet: I have not stored anything yet. Tell me your preferences or information in chat and I will learn automatically.
settings.addonsIntro: Addons extend Homun with their own panel and engine. Detaching one removes both its navigation entry and its engine.
settings.addonsMarketplaceIntro: Local view of the signed plugin registry cached by Homun. Install actions stay behind the verified backend package manager.
settings.addonsNoRegistryCache: No plugin registry cache yet. Fetch a registry first from the backend or a future Homun marketplace feed.
settings.addonsBetaOptInHint: Stable stays the default; beta packages require this explicit local opt-in.
settings.localComputerDockerOff: The contained computer needs Docker, which isn't available on this deployment.
settings.localComputerAutostartDesc: Warm up the local computer when the app starts, opening Docker if it's closed. Turn off if you don't want Docker started every launch.

model.timeout: The model took too long to respond. Try again shortly.
model.generic: The model responded with an error ({{code}}). Try again shortly; if it persists, check the provider in Settings.

browser.unavailable: Browser automation is not available right now.
browser.actionBlocked: This action is not available from the channel.
browser.snapshotFailed: Could not read the page snapshot.

onboarding.prereqSubtitle: Homun runs on Docker and Ollama. We detect them — install any that's missing and it ticks itself off.
onboarding.dockerDesc: Runs the contained computer (browser, shell, tools)
onboarding.ollamaDesc: Runs local AI models on your machine
onboarding.modelSubtitle: Local-first by default. Connect a cloud provider any time.
onboarding.specsLine: Your machine: {{ram}} GB RAM · {{cpus}} cores. Here's what runs well.
onboarding.providerHint: Enter your API key to retrieve the available models, or add a custom model.
onboarding.readyDesc: Your AI is ready. The rest I learn by chatting with you.

login.subtitle: Enter your access token to continue.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: System status and updates.
notifications.computerOffBody: Enable the contained browser/sandbox so the agent can use a real computer.
notifications.updateBody: Pull and deploy the latest image.
notifications.updateStarted: Redeploy started — the app will restart shortly.
notifications.desktopUpdateBody: Version {{version}} is available — download and restart to install.
notifications.desktopUpdateRestarts: Downloading — the app restarts on its own when it's done.
